issues.summary: Login button not working on Safari mobile
issues.description: Users report the login button is unresponsive on Safari iOS. Steps to reproduce: 1) Open app in Safari 2) Click login button 3) Nothing happens.
Payment processing times out after 30 seconds even when payment is successful. Users see 'Payment Failed' but money is deducted.

issues.summary: Dashboard not loading for admin users
issues.description: Admin users see a blank dashboard. Regular users can see it fine.
Users are not receiving email notifications for password resets and order confirmations.
When filtering by date, results show items outside the selected range.
